name: Cajun Crabmeat Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat all ingredients except crabmeat, green pepper, and crackers in a 2.5-quart bowl on medium speed until well blended, about 1 minute.
2. Stir in the crabmeat and green pepper.
3. Line a deep 1.5-pint bowl with plastic wrap; press the mixture into the bowl.
4. Cover and refrigerate until firm, about 3 hours.
5. Unmold on serving plate; remove plastic wrap.
6. Garnish with chili peppers if desired.
7. Serve with crackers. (About 3 cups spread per serving; approximately 60 calories per serving.)
